summary: Iteration 106: Production Console (CosmicMixer) and Cosmic Pairs - All features tested and working. Frontend-only testing completed successfully.
context_for_next_testing_agent: Production Console (CosmicMixer) fully implemented with 7 channel strips. Cosmic Pairs feature working in both Dance & Music Studio page and Split View dropdown menu.

production_console_cosmicmixer.floating_button: PASS - data-testid='mixer-toggle' appears for logged-in users only
production_console_cosmicmixer.opens_on_click: PASS - data-testid='cosmic-mixer-panel' opens as bottom sheet
production_console_cosmicmixer.ambient_channel: PASS - 5 ambient sounds (Rain, Ocean, Wind, Fire, Singing Bowl)
production_console_cosmicmixer.instrument_drone_channel: PASS - 6 instrument drones (Sitar, Tanpura, Didgeridoo, Bowl, Flute, Erhu)
production_console_cosmicmixer.mantra_channel: PASS - 6 mantras with TTS audio generation
production_console_cosmicmixer.light_channel: PASS - 6 light modes with full-screen overlay (data-testid='light-overlay')
production_console_cosmicmixer.video_channel: PASS - 5 video overlays with opacity control (data-testid='video-overlay')
production_console_cosmicmixer.haptic_channel: PASS - Vibration toggle synced to active frequency
production_console_cosmicmixer.per_channel_volume_faders: PASS - Faders appear when layer is active
production_console_cosmicmixer.active_layer_count_badge: PASS - Shows count on mixer-toggle button

cosmic_pairs.all_6_pairs_present: PASS - sitar-indigo, bowl-frequencies, flute-healing, drums-soundscape, hang-meditation, kalimba-zen
cosmic_pairs.clicking_pair_opens_split_view: PASS - Opens split-screen-panel with paired app
cosmic_pairs.pairs_in_split_view_dropdown: PASS - Cosmic Pairs section at top of split-screen-menu

dance_music_studio.category_filter_chips: PASS - All, India, Native American, West Africa, Africa, Tibet, Japan, China, Middle East, Australia, Andes, Switzerland, South America

smartdock.mixer_button: PASS - data-testid='dock-mixer' opens Production Console panel

split_view.toggle_in_navigation: PASS - data-testid='split-screen-toggle' visible in nav bar
split_view.dropdown_menu: PASS - data-testid='split-screen-menu' shows Cosmic Pairs and 30+ apps
split_view.cosmic_pairs_in_menu: PASS - First 3 pairs shown with descriptions
